COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-11-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: Mitch Lyon.
Scott H. Wechsler, Esq., for Plaintiff: Jonathan Woodard, present, was sworn and examined.
No appearance by Defendants: DRM Enterprises and Joe Lato.
After hearing the testimony, the Court takes the matter under submission.
Counsel to prepare and submit a Judgment.

Jan. 10, 2007
Proposed Judgment rec'd in court.
Judgment granted and signed by Comm. Kaplan, see scanned for details.

Off Calendar Nov-30-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Defendants Charles Cole, Ideal Protective Services, and K. J. Lato for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is ordered off calendar/compliance. Proceedings reported by: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. (212)

MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-14-2006 Text Ruling

Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Deft Walgreen Co. To Compel Depositions Of Defts Charles Cole, K.J. Lato And Ideal Protective Services, Inc.'S Person Most Knowledgable; And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-31-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Walgreen Company's motion to compel the depositions of defendants Cole and Lato and the person most knowledgeable of Ideal Protective Services is granted. The deponents are ordered to contact counsel for defendant immediately to schedule their depositions. The depositions are to be completed by September 29, 2006. Failure to appear for deposition was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $500 are to be paid by September 29, 2006. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
